news.paragraph: TLT is facing a mix of macroeconomic drivers as seasonal tailwinds for long-term Treasuries align with expectations for eventual rate cuts. However, a stronger-than-expected April jobs report has bolstered growth prospects, which may lead the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates on hold for longer. Traders should weigh these competing signals regarding interest rate direction and seasonal trends before opening new contracts.
